prompt: A cinematic poster-style digital collage shaped like the side profile silhouette of a male football legend, facing left, on a textured off-white background with rough painterly brush strokes around the silhouette edges. The image uses a luxurious dark navy, sepia, bronze, and gold color palette with dramatic high contrast lighting, glowing highlights, and a prestige editorial feel. Inside the silhouette, build a layered visual journey of ambition and greatness with exactly 8 distinct scene elements: 1) at the upper left inside the head, a young boy in shorts stands on a rocky seaside cliff beside a football, looking toward a glowing coastal mountain landscape at sunset; 2) on the right side of the upper head area, a small boat on the water near the cliffs; 3) in the center, an adult footballer in light kit suspended midair as if striking or controlling the ball, dynamic and heroic; 4) at the mid-left lower area, a lone man standing on a floodlit pitch seen from behind; 5) across the middle, a row of 5 golden Ballon d'Or-style trophy spheres glowing prominently; 6) at the lower left, a football stadium rendered as a bright golden ring of light with a small player silhouette nearby and crashing ocean waves in front; 7) near the lower center, a seated contemplative figure on a jagged rock peak; 8) at the bottom right, a long illuminated road cutting through desert-like terrain toward the horizon. Add an architectural colonnade with warm lights running through the central-right interior of the silhouette, blending into the layered scenes. The hair of the profile should be dark and textured, with the facial silhouette partially open to white negative space on the right for typography. Place large elegant metallic-gold text on the lower right reading MADE BY OBSESSION, and beneath it a smaller italic serif subtitle reading A Life Scored In Gold. Make the subject feel like Cristiano Ronaldo without using a photoreal likeness, emphasizing mythic legacy, perseverance, football greatness, and a premium sports documentary poster aesthetic. Vertical composition, highly detailed, cinematic atmosphere, fine-art sports poster, subtle grain, painterly compositing, glowing gold accents.
